member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CharacterMap
member.summary: Filled by cmap type 4 and 12.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CharacterMap.SetGlyphCount(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Glyph count is used for validating cmap contents. If we discover that glyph index we are about to set or return is outside of glyph range, we throw an exception.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CodePointGlyphIndexPair
member.summary: The combination of a Unicode code point and the glyph index of this code point in a particular font face.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CodePointGlyphIndexPair.#ctor(System.Int32,System.UInt16)
member.summary: The combination of a Unicode code point and the glyph index of this code point in a particular font face.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CodePointGlyphIndexPair.CodePoint
member.summary: The Unicode code point of the Character value. The code point can be 0 to indicate that the original character is not a valid UTF-32 code unit. This can happen when a string contains a single high or low surrogate without its counterpart.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CodePointGlyphIndexPair.GlyphIndex
member.summary: The glyph index of the code point for a specific OpenType font. The value is 0 if the specific font has no glyph for the code point.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphIndexGlyphColorRecordPair
member.summary: The combination of a glyph index and its glyph record in the color table, if it exists.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphIndexGlyphColorRecordPair.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.Nullable{PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ColorTable.GlyphRecord})
member.summary: The combination of a glyph index and its glyph record in the color table, if it exists.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphIndexGlyphColorRecordPair.GlyphIndex
member.summary: The glyph index.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphIndexGlyphColorRecordPair.ColorRecord
member.summary: The color-record of the glyph if provided by the font.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontTechnology
member.summary: Identifies the technology of an OpenType font file.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontTechnology.PostscriptOutlines
member.summary: Font is Adobe Postscript font in CFF.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontTechnology.TrueTypeOutlines
member.summary: Font is a TrueType font.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontTechnology.TrueTypeCollection
member.summary: Font is a TrueType font collection.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames
member.summary: Case-sensitive TrueType font table names.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.CMap
member.summary: Character to glyph mapping.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Head
member.summary: Font header.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.HHea
member.summary: Horizontal header.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.HMtx
member.summary: Horizontal Metrics.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.MaxP
member.summary: Maximum profile.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Name
member.summary: Naming table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.OS2
member.summary: OS/2 and Windows specific Metrics.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Post
member.summary: PostScript information.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Cvt
member.summary: Control Value Table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Fpgm
member.summary: Font program.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Glyf
member.summary: Glyph data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Loca
member.summary: Index to location.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Prep
member.summary: CVT Program.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Cff
member.summary: PostScript font program (compact font format).

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.VOrg
member.summary: Vertical Origin.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.EBDT
member.summary: Embedded bitmap data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.EBLC
member.summary: Embedded bitmap location data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.EBSC
member.summary: Embedded bitmap scaling data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.BASE
member.summary: Baseline data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.GDEF
member.summary: Glyph definition data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.GPOS
member.summary: Glyph positioning data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.GSUB
member.summary: Glyph substitution data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.JSTF
member.summary: Justification data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.COLR
member.summary: Color table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.CPAL
member.summary: Color pallet table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.DSIG
member.summary: Digital signature.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Gasp
member.summary: Grid-fitting/Scan-conversion.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Hdmx
member.summary: Horizontal device Metrics.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.Kern
member.summary: Kerning.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.LTSH
member.summary: Linear threshold data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.PCLT
member.summary: PCL 5 data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.VDMX
member.summary: Vertical device Metrics.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.VHea
member.summary: Vertical Header.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableTagNames.VMtx
member.summary: Vertical Metrics.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.ON_CURVE_POINT
member.summary: Bit 0: If set, the point is on the curve; otherwise, it is off the curve.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.X_SHORT_VECTOR
member.summary: Bit 1: If set, the corresponding x-coordinate is 1 byte long, and the sign is determined by the X_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_X_SHORT_VECTOR flag. If not set, its interpretation depends on the X_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_X_SHORT_VECTOR flag: If that other flag is set, the x-coordinate is the same as the previous x-coordinate, and no element is added to the xCoordinates array. If both flags are not set, the corresponding element in the xCoordinates array is two bytes and interpreted as a signed integer. See the description of the X_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_X_SHORT_VECTOR flag for additional information.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.Y_SHORT_VECTOR
member.summary: Bit 2: If set, the corresponding y-coordinate is 1 byte long, and the sign is determined by the Y_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_Y_SHORT_VECTOR flag. If not set, its interpretation depends on the Y_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_Y_SHORT_VECTOR flag: If that other flag is set, the y-coordinate is the same as the previous y-coordinate, and no element is added to the yCoordinates array. If both flags are not set, the corresponding element in the yCoordinates array is two bytes and interpreted as a signed integer. See the description of the Y_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_Y_SHORT_VECTOR flag for additional information.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.REPEAT_FLAG
member.summary: Bit 3: If set, the next byte (read as unsigned) specifies the number of additional times this flag byte is to be repeated in the logical flags array — that is, the number of additional logical flag entries inserted after this entry. (In the expanded logical array, this bit is ignored.) In this way, the number of flags listed can be smaller than the number of points in the glyph description.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.X_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_X_SHORT_VECTOR
member.summary: Bit 4: This flag has two meanings, depending on how the X_SHORT_VECTOR flag is set. If X_SHORT_VECTOR is set, this bit describes the sign of the value, with 1 equaling positive and 0 negative. If X_SHORT_VECTOR is not set and this bit is set, then the current x-coordinate is the same as the previous x-coordinate. If X_SHORT_VECTOR is not set and this bit is also not set, the current x-coordinate is a signed 16-bit delta vector.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.Y_IS_SAME_OR_POSITIVE_Y_SHORT_VECTOR
member.summary: Bit 5: This flag has two meanings, depending on how the Y_SHORT_VECTOR flag is set. If Y_SHORT_VECTOR is set, this bit describes the sign of the value, with 1 equaling positive and 0 negative. If Y_SHORT_VECTOR is not set and this bit is set, then the current y-coordinate is the same as the previous y-coordinate. If Y_SHORT_VECTOR is not set and this bit is also not set, the current y-coordinate is a signed 16-bit delta vector.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.OVERLAP_SIMPLE
member.summary: Bit 6: If set, contours in the glyph description could overlap. Use of this flag is not required — that is, contours may overlap without having this flag set. When used, it must be set on the first flag byte for the glyph. See additional details below.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.SimpleGlyphFlags.Reserved
member.summary: Bit 7 is reserved: set to zero.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.ARG_1_AND_2_ARE_WORDS
member.summary: Bit 0: If this is set, the arguments are 16-bit (uint16 or int16); otherwise, they are bytes (uint8 or int8).

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES
member.summary: Bit 1: If this is set, the arguments are signed xy values; otherwise, they are unsigned point numbers.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.ROUND_XY_TO_GRID
member.summary: Bit 2: If set and ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES is also set, the xy values are rounded to the nearest grid line. Ignored if ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES is not set.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.WE_HAVE_A_SCALE
member.summary: Bit 3: This indicates that there is a simple scale for the component. Otherwise, scale = 1.0.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.MORE_COMPONENTS
member.summary: Bit 5: Indicates at least one more glyph after this one.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.WE_HAVE_AN_X_AND_Y_SCALE
member.summary: Bit 6: The x direction will use a different scale from the y direction.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.WE_HAVE_A_TWO_BY_TWO
member.summary: Bit 7: There is a 2 by 2 transformation that will be used to scale the component.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.WE_HAVE_INSTRUCTIONS
member.summary: Bit 8: Following the last component are instructions for the composite glyph.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.USE_MY_METRICS
member.summary: Bit 9: If set, this forces the aw and lsb (and rsb) for the composite to be equal to those from this component glyph. This works for hinted and unhinted glyphs.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.OVERLAP_COMPOUND
member.summary: Bit 10: If set, the components of the compound glyph overlap. Use of this flag is not required — that is, component glyphs may overlap without having this flag set. When used, it must be set on the flag word for the first component. Some rasterizer implementations may require fonts to use this flag to obtain correct behavior — see additional remarks, above, for the similar OVERLAP_SIMPLE flag used in simple-glyph descriptions.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.SCALED_COMPONENT_OFFSET
member.summary: Bit 11: The composite is designed to have the component offset scaled. Ignored if ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES is not set.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.UNSCALED_COMPONENT_OFFSET
member.summary: Bit 12: The composite is designed not to have the component offset scaled. Ignored if ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES is not set.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ComponentGlyphFlags.Reserved
member.summary: Bits 4, 13, 14 and 15 are reserved: set to 0.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable
member.summary: This table contains information that describes the glyphs in the font in the TrueType outline format. Information regarding the rasterizer (scaler) refers to the TrueType rasterizer. http://www.microsoft.com/typography/otspec/glyf.htm

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.Read
member.summary: Converts the bytes in a handy representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.GetGlyphData(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the data of the specified glyph.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.GetGlyphSize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the size of the byte array that defines the glyph.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.GetOffset(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the offset of the specified glyph relative to the first byte of the font image.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.CompleteGlyphClosure(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.UInt16,System.Object})
member.summary: Adds for all composite glyphs, the glyphs the composite one is made of.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.AddCompositeGlyphs(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.UInt16,System.Object},System.Int32)
member.summary: If the specified glyph is a composite glyph add the glyphs it is made of to the glyph table.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.GetGlyphHeader(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets the glyph header for the specified glyph. Used in PDFsharp Graphics to calculate right and bottom side bearings.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.PrepareForCompilation
member.summary: Prepares the font table to be compiled into its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphDataTable.Write(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter)
member.summary: Converts the font into its binary representation.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphHeader.numberOfContours
member.summary: If the number of contours is greater than or equal to zero, this is a simple glyph. If negative, this is a composite glyph — the value -1 should be used for composite glyphs.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IRefFontTable
member.summary: Represents an indirect reference to an existing font table in a font image. Used to create binary copies of an existing font table that is not modified.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IRefFontTable.PrepareForCompilation
member.summary: Prepares the font table to be compiled into its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IRefFontTable.Write(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter)
member.summary: Converts the font into its binary representation.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OTFontStyleHack
member.summary: Specifies style information applied to text. Note that this enum was named XFontStyle in PDFsharp versions prior to 6.0.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OTFontStyleHack.Bold
member.summary: Bold text.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OTFontStyleHack.Italic
member.summary: Italic text.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OTFontStyleHack.BoldItalic
member.summary: Bold and italic text.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NRT.ThrowOnNull(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an InvalidOperationException because an expression which must not be null is null.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NRT.ThrowOnNull``1(System.String)
member.summary: Throws InvalidOperationException. Use this function during the transition from older C# code to new code that uses nullable reference types.
member.typeparam: The type this function must return to be compiled correctly.
member.param: An optional message used for the exception.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontEmbedding.TryComputeSubset
member.summary: OpenType font files with TrueType outline are embedded as a font subset. OpenType font files with PostScript outline are embedded as they are, because PDFsharp cannot compute subsets from this type of font files.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontEmbedding.EmbedCompleteFontFile
member.summary: The font file is completely embedded. No subset is computed.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor
member.summary: The OpenType font descriptor. This class consolidates all relevant properties of a font face needed for glyph typeface, typeface, and font family. The calculation of some properties is identical to the calculation of these values in WPF.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.OTFamilyName
member.summary: Name ID 1 (Font Family name) from the names table in en-US.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.OTSubfamilyName
member.summary: Name ID 2 (Font Subfamily name) from the names table in en-US.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.FamilyName
member.summary: Initially same as OTFamilyName. The value can be overridden during font registration.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.FaceName
member.summary: Initially same as OTSubfamilyName. The value can be overridden during font registration.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.GlyphCount
member.summary: The number of glyphs in the font.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.OTFontStyle
member.summary: Value depending on bit 0, 6, and 9 of fsSelection (font selection flag) from OS/2 table. Value is 0, 1, or 2: Normal, Oblique, or Italic. The value can be overridden during font registration.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.OTFontWeight
member.summary: Value of usWeightClass from OS/2 table. The value can be overridden during font registration.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.OTFontStretch
member.summary: Value of usWidthClass from OS/2 table. The value can be overridden during font registration.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.IsBoldFace
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance belongs to a bold font.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.IsItalicFace
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance belongs to an italic font.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.UnitsPerEm
member.summary: head unitsPerEm.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.Height
member.summary: Same as Ascender + Descender.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.Baseline
member.summary: (Ascender + LineSpacing - Descender) * .5

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.CapHeight
member.summary: OS/2 sCapHeight.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.XHeight
member.summary: OS/2 sxHeight.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.UnderlinePosition
member.summary: post underlinePosition.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.UnderlineThickness
member.summary: post underlineThickness.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.StrikeoutPosition
member.summary: OS/2 yStrikeoutPosition.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.StrikeoutSize
member.summary: OS/2 yStrikeoutSize.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.Ascender
member.summary: OS/2 usWinDescent.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.Descender
member.summary: OS/2 usWinDescent.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.Leading
member.summary: LineSpacing - (Ascender + Descender);.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.LineGap
member.summary: hhea lineGap.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.LineSpacing
member.summary: max(lineGap + ascender + descender, winAscent + winDescent).

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.ItalicAngle
member.summary: (Not used).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.BmpCodepointToGlyphIndex(System.Char)
member.summary: Maps a Unicode code point from the BMP to the index of the corresponding glyph. Returns 0 if no glyph exists for the specified character. See OpenType spec "cmap - Character To Glyph Index Mapping Table / Format 4: Segment mapping to delta values" for details about this a little bit strange looking algorithm.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.SurrogatePairToGlyphIndex(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Maps a Unicode character from outside the BMP to the index of the corresponding glyph. Returns 0 if no glyph exists for the specified code point. See OpenType spec "cmap - Character To Glyph Index Mapping Table / Format 12: Segmented coverage" for details about this a little bit strange looking algorithm.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.CodepointToGlyphIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps a Unicode code point to the index of the corresponding glyph. Returns 0 if no glyph exists for the specified character. Should only be called for code points that are not from BMP. See OpenType spec "cmap - Character To Glyph Index Mapping Table / Format 4: Segment mapping to delta values" for details about this a little bit strange looking algorithm.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.GlyphIndexToPdfWidth(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Converts the width of a glyph identified by its index to PDF design units. Index 0 also returns a valid font specific width for the non-existing glyph.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.GlyphIndexToEmWidth(System.UInt16,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts the width of a glyph identified by its index to PDF design units.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.GlyphIndexToWidth(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts the width of a glyph identified by its index to PDF design units.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.IsSymbolFont
member.summary: Converts the code units of a UTF-16 string into the glyph identifier of this font. If useAnsiCharactersOnly is true, only valid ANSI code units a taken into account. All non-ANSI characters are skipped and not part of the result.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.RemapSymbolChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Remaps a character of a symbol font. Required to get the correct glyph identifier from the cmap type 4 table.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor.GetColorRecord(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the color-record of the glyph with the specified index.
member.returns: The color-record for the specified glyph or null, if the specified glyph has no color record.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace
member.summary: Represents an OpenType font face in memory.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.#ctor(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace)
member.summary: Shallow copy for font subset.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.FullFaceName
member.summary: Gets the full face name from the name table. Name is also used as the key.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.CheckSum
member.summary: Gets the 64-bit check sum to identify the font face by its font source.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OTFontSource
member.summary: Gets the bytes that represents the font data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.TableDictionary
member.summary: The dictionary of all font tables.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.AddTable(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable)
member.summary: Adds the specified table to this font image.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.Read
member.summary: Reads all required tables from the font data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.CreateFontSubset(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.UInt16,System.Object},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new font image that is a subset of this font image containing only the specified glyphs.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.Compile
member.summary: Compiles the font to its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads a System.Byte.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadShort
member.summary: Reads a System.Int16.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadUShort
member.summary: Reads a System.UInt16.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadLong
member.summary: Reads a System.Int32.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadULong
member.summary: Reads a System.UInt32.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadFixed
member.summary: Reads a System.Int32.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadFWord
member.summary: Reads a System.Int16.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadUFWord
member.summary: Reads a System.UInt16.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadLongDate
member.summary: Reads a System.Int64.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadString(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a System.String with the specified size.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a System.Byte[] with the specified size.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.Read(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reads the specified buffer.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the specified buffer.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.ReadTag
member.summary: Reads a System.Char[4] as System.String.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Gets the DebuggerDisplayAttribute text.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable
member.summary: Represents the font offset table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.Version
member.summary: 0x00010000 for Version 1.0.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.TableCount
member.summary: Number of tables.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.SearchRange
member.summary: (Maximum power of 2 ≤ numTables) x 16.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.EntrySelector
member.summary: Log2(maximum power of 2 ≤ numTables).

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.RangeShift
member.summary: NumTables x 16-searchRange.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace.OffsetTable.Write(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter)
member.summary: Writes the offset table.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFaceCache
member.summary: Global table of all OpenType font faces cached by their face name and check sum.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFaceCache.TryGetFontFace(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace@)
member.summary: Tries to get font face by its key.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFaceCache.TryGetFontFace(System.UInt64,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace@)
member.summary: Tries to get font face by its font source check sum.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFaceCache.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Gets the DebuggerDisplayAttribute text.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals
member.summary: The class that holds all OpenType global stuff in a singleton.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage
member.summary: Stores font information from PdfSharp.OpenType assembly.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontFaceCache
member.summary: Maps face name to OpenType font face.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontFacesByCheckSum
member.summary: Maps font source key to OpenType font face.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontDescriptorCache
member.summary: Maps font descriptor key to OpenTypeFontDescriptor. TODO: Replace by FontFaceCache.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontFamilyByName
member.summary: Maps family name to OpenType font family.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontSourcesByName
member.summary: Maps typeface key or font name to font source.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.FontSourcesByKey
member.summary: Maps font source key (FSK) to font source. The key is a simple hash code of the font face data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.Version
member.summary: Gets the version of this instance.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.OtFontStorage.GlyphTypefaceByKey
member.summary: Maps typeface key to OpenType glyph typeface.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals.Version
member.summary: Gets the version of this instance.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals._globalVersionCount
member.summary: The global version count gives every new instance of OtGlobals a new unique version number.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OtGlobals._global
member.summary: The container of all global stuff in PDFsharp.OpenType. By creating a new instance of OtGlobals all caches are reset as if an application starts in a new process.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamily
member.summary: Represents a family of related OpenType fonts.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamily.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamily.GetGlyphTypefaces
member.summary: Gets a collection of the OpenType glyph typefaces of this family

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamily.FamilyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the font family.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamilyCache
member.summary: Global table of all OpenType font faces cached by their face name and check sum.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamilyCache.TryGetFontFamily(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFamily@)
member.summary: Tries to get font face by its family name.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontRegistry
member.summary: A hack to bootstrap the interaction of FontFamily, Typeface, and FontFace.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource
member.summary: The raw bytes of a font file in memory.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.GetOrCreateFrom(System.Byte[],System.UInt64)
member.summary: Gets an existing font source or creates a new one. A new font source is cached in OpenTypeFontSourceCache.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.GetOrCreateFrom(System.Uri)
member.summary: Creates an OpenTypeFontSource from a URI. Returns null if the URI does not exist or is not a file URI.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.CreateCompiledFont(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a font source from a byte array. The result is not cached.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.OTFontFace
member.summary: Gets or sets the (first) font face.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.ChecksumKey
member.summary: Gets the key that uniquely identifies this font source.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.FontFaceKey
member.summary: //Gets the name of the font’s name table.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.Bytes
member.summary: Gets the bytes of the font.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this instance.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current object.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Gets the DebuggerDisplayAttribute text.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSourceCache
member.summary: Provides functionality to map a font face request to a physical font.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSourceCache.HasFontSources
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether at least one font source was created.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSourceCache.CacheFontSource(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource)
member.summary: Caches a font source under its face name and its key.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSourceCache.CacheNewFontSource(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontSource)
member.summary: Caches a font source under its face name and its key.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable
member.summary: Base class for all OpenType tables used in PDFsharp.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable.Clone
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current instance.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable.FontData
member.summary: Gets the font image the table belongs to.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable.PrepareForCompilation
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, prepares the font table to be compiled into its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable.Write(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter)
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, converts the font into its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontTable.CalcChecksum(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculates the checksum of a table represented by its bytes.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.WinEncodingId
member.summary: Only Symbol and Unicode are used by PDFsharp.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameId
member.summary: Name IDs of strings in name table.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CMap4
member.summary: CMap format 4: Segment mapping to delta values. The Windows standard format.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CMap12
member.summary: CMap format 12: Segmented coverage. The Windows standard format.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CMapTable
member.summary: This table defines the mapping of character codes to the glyph index values used in the font. It may contain more than one subtable, in order to support more than one character encoding scheme.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CMapTable.symbol
member.summary: Is true for symbol font encoding.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.CMapTable.#ctor(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ColorTable
member.summary: This table adds support for multi-colored glyphs in a manner that integrates with the rasterizers of existing text engines and that is designed to be easy to support with current OpenType font files.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ColorPalletTable
member.summary: This table is a set of one or more palettes, each containing a predefined number of color records. It may also contain 'name' table IDs describing the palettes and their entries.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontHeaderTable
member.summary: This table gives global information about the font. The bounding box values should be computed using only glyphs that have contours. Glyphs with no contours should be ignored for the purposes of these calculations.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.HorizontalHeaderTable
member.summary: This table contains information for horizontal layout. The values in the minRightSideBearing, MinLeftSideBearing and xMaxExtent should be computed using only glyphs that have contours. Glyphs with no contours should be ignored for the purposes of these calculations. All reserved areas must be set to 0.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.HorizontalMetricsTable
member.summary: The type longHorMetric is defined as an array where each element has two parts: the advance width, which is of type USHORT, and the left side bearing, which is of type SHORT. These fields are in font design units.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.VerticalHeaderTable
member.summary: The vertical header table contains information needed for vertical layout of Chinese, Japanese, Korean (CJK) and other ideographic scripts. In vertical layout, these scripts are written either top to bottom or bottom to top. This table contains information that is general to the font as a whole. Information that pertains to specific glyphs is given in the vertical metrics ('vmtx') table. The formats of these tables are similar to those for horizontal metrics, 'hhea' and 'hmtx'. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/opentype/spec/vhea

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.VerticalMetricsTable
member.summary: The vertical metrics table allows you to specify the vertical spacing for each glyph in a vertical font. This table consists of either one or two arrays that contain metric information (the advance heights and top sidebearings) for the vertical layout of each of the glyphs in the font. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/opentype/spec/vmtx

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.MaximumProfileTable
member.summary: This table establishes the memory requirements for this font. Fonts with CFF data must use Version 0.5 of this table, specifying only the numGlyphs field. Fonts with TrueType outlines must use Version 1.0 of this table, where all data is required. Both formats of OpenType require a 'maxp' table because a number of applications call the Windows GetFontData() API on the 'maxp' table to determine the number of glyphs in the font.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameTable
member.summary:
The naming table allows multilingual strings to be associated with the OpenType font file. These strings can represent copyright notices, font names, family names, style names, and so on. To keep this table short, the font manufacturer may wish to make a limited set of entries in some small set of languages; later, the font can be "localized" and the strings translated or added. Other parts of the OpenType font file that require these strings can then refer to them simply by their index number. Clients that need a particular string can look it up by its platform ID, character encoding ID, language ID and name ID. Note that some platforms may require single byte character strings, while others may require double byte strings.
For historical reasons, some applications which install fonts perform Version control using Macintosh platform (platform ID 1) strings from the 'name' table. Because of this, we strongly recommend that the 'name' table of all fonts include Macintosh platform strings and that the syntax of the Version number (name ID 5) follows the guidelines given in this document.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameTable.OTFamilyName
member.summary: Get the OpenType family name. This is the FamilyName in FontFace.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameTable.OTSubfamilyName
member.summary: Get the OpenType subfamily name. This is the FaceName in FontFace.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameTable.OTFullFontName
member.summary: Get the OpenType full font name.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.NameTable.NamesEnUs
member.summary: All en-US names of the name table.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OS2Table
member.summary: The OS/2 table consists of a set of Metrics that are required in OpenType fonts.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.PostScriptTable
member.summary: This table contains additional information needed to use TrueType or OpenType fonts on PostScript printers.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ControlValueTable
member.summary: This table contains a list of values that can be referenced by instructions. They can be used, among other things, to control characteristics for different glyphs. The length of the table must be an integral number of FWORD units.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontProgram
member.summary: This table is similar to the CVT Program, except that it is only run once, when the font is first used. It is used only for FDEFs and IDEFs. Thus, the CVT Program need not contain function definitions. However, the CVT Program may redefine existing FDEFs or IDEFs.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.ControlValueProgram
member.summary: The Control Value Program consists of a set of TrueType instructions that will be executed whenever the font or point size or transformation matrix change and before each glyph is interpreted. Any instruction is legal in the CVT Program but since no glyph is associated with it, instructions intended to move points within a particular glyph outline cannot be used in the CVT Program. The name 'prep' is anachronistic.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.GlyphSubstitutionTable
member.summary: This table contains information that describes the glyphs in the font in the TrueType outline format. Information regarding the rasterizer (scaler) refers to the TrueType rasterizer.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter
member.summary: Represents a writer for True Type font files.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter.WriteTag(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a table name.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter
member.summary: Represents a writer for generation of font file streams.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Data is written in Motorola format (big-endian).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.Close(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Closes the writer and, if specified, the underlying stream.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.Close
member.summary: Closes the writer and the underlying stream.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position within the stream.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteByte(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteByte(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteShort(System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteShort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteUShort(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteUShort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteInt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.WriteUInt(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes the specified value to the font stream using big-endian.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.FontWriter.Stream
member.summary: Gets the underlying stream.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeGlyphTypeface
member.summary: Represents an OpenType glyph typeface.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeGlyphTypefaceCache
member.summary: Global table of all OpenType glyph typefaces cached by their face name and check sum.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeGlyphTypefaceCache.TryGetGlyphTypeface(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeGlyphTypeface@)
member.summary: Tries to get an OpenTypeGlyphTypeface by its typeface key.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeGlyphTypefaceCache.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Gets the DebuggerDisplayAttribute text.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry
member.summary: Represents an entry in the fonts table dictionary.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.Tag
member.summary: 4-byte identifier.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.CheckSum
member.summary: CheckSum for this table.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.Offset
member.summary: Offset from beginning of TrueType font file.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.Length
member.summary: Actual length of this table in bytes.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.PaddedLength
member.summary: Gets the length rounded up to a multiple of four bytes.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.FontTable
member.summary: Associated font table.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.TableDirectoryEntry.ReadFrom(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontFace)
member.summary: Creates and reads a TableDirectoryEntry from the font image.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IndexToLocationTable
member.summary: The indexToLoc table stores the offsets to the locations of the glyphs in the font, relative to the beginning of the glyphData table. In order to compute the length of the last glyph element, there is an extra entry after the last valid index.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IndexToLocationTable.Read
member.summary: Converts the bytes in a handy representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IndexToLocationTable.PrepareForCompilation
member.summary: Prepares the font table to be compiled into its binary representation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.IndexToLocationTable.Write(PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontWriter)
member.summary: Converts the font into its binary representation.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.UnicodeHelper
member.summary: A bunch of internal functions to handle Unicode.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.UnicodeHelper.Utf32FromString(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Byte)
member.summary: Converts a UTF-16 string into an array of Unicode code points.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.UnicodeHelper.SymbolCodePointsFromString(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.OpenTypeFontDescriptor)
member.summary: Converts a UTF-16 string into an array of code points of a symbol font.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.OpenType.UnicodeHelper.ConvertToUtf32(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Convert a surrogate pair to UTF-32 code point. Similar to Char.ConvertToUtf32 but never throws an error. Instead, returns 0 if one of the surrogates are invalid.
